hooks.command: $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $json.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -like 'packages/shared/*') { pnpm --filter @takemethere/shared test } elseif ($f -like 'packages/backend/*') { pnpm --filter @takemethere/backend test } elseif ($f -like 'packages/frontend/*') { pnpm --filter @takemethere/frontend test }
